__comment: Sanitized snapshot of the live production AppState document (intern_data, v0 schema, captured 2026-07-07). Structure, ids, dates, hours types (int vs float), field presence/absence, and competency tags are EXACTLY as live; narrative text is replaced. Notable real-world traits: older logs have NO title field; one log has empty taggedCompetencyIds; location is always empty string; sites/shelves/competencyReflections are empty; artifacts were excluded from the capture (base64 payloads) — represented here as an empty array. Migration tests must preserve every key/value in this document.

logs.activity: Observed district leaders review course catalogue changes ahead of a School Board presentation, including math pathway adjustments and a new program course description.
Attended a district literacy update related to the READ Act, specifically screening students in grades 6-12.
Mentor walkthrough of how district leadership responds to state declarations, including unified decision-making across buildings and weighing differing stakeholder responses.
Discussion of record-keeping for student behavioral infractions, investigations, and the legal implications of that work.
Participated in hiring a long-term substitute teacher; coached afterward on interview protocol boundaries, panel composition, and reference/background checks.
Brainstorming meeting on changing club meeting times following a board policy review and Equal Access law alignment.

Extended prep meeting for a board presentation on course catalog changes: visuals, course naming, legislative and MDE requirements, policy context, and anticipating board questions. (Original entry was a very long multi-paragraph narrative.)
Met with mentors to discuss a leadership-team member's PLC concerns and plan communication of a policy change affecting the building.
ADSIS mid-year meeting with all district principals, special education director, and literacy specialist; reviewed goals and FTE allocation. (NOTE: this real entry has NO competency tags.)
Literacy screening meeting on training and implementation of a screening assessment aligned with the state READ Act.
Collaborated with an interventionist to complete required grant documentation shared with district special education and literacy leadership.

logs.title: ReadBasix Meeting
logs.activity: Confirmed testing dates for each building, solidified lists, established a family-letter process, and planned proctor training.

logs.title: Follow-Up Meeting Regarding Student Behavior and Investigation
logs.activity: Debriefed specific student behavioral situations with mentor; discussed the relationship between local law enforcement, schools, and investigations.

logs.title: Chaperone of OMS Dance
logs.activity: Admin hours at the middle school supporting a school event.

logs.title: Post-Observation Probationary Teacher
logs.activity: Sat in on a post-observation conference for a probationary teacher, then debriefed with the assistant principal.

logs.title: Student Behavior
logs.activity: Worked with the assistant principal to learn how incident reports are run and how referrals are handled.

logs.title: Meeting with Students Regarding Behavioral Infractions
logs.activity: Observed the associate principal meeting with students about behavioral infractions: debriefing, family contact, and logging in the student information system.

logs.title: Planning Whole-Staff PD for August  Back-to-School Workshop
logs.activity: Met with an external PD partner to plan back-to-school professional development options.

logs.title: Science Teacher Interviews
logs.activity: Participated in interviews for an open science position.

logs.title: Reading intervention K, 1, and 2 planning meeting with district literacy specialist
logs.activity: Met with the district literacy specialist to plan summer reading intervention for early-elementary students.
